controller_gains._comment: Equation (14) controller gains: k_n3 = attitude error coupling, k_vz = vertical velocity

altitude_pd._comment: Altitude PD controller: z_d is in NED frame (negative = up), gains control vz_d

desired_states._comment: Desired body z-axis orientation [n3_x_d, n3_y_d]. [0,0] = level hover

physical_parameters._comment: Vehicle physical parameters: mass (kg), gravity (m/s^2), inertias (kg*m^2)

run_settings._comment: Duration of the flight test in seconds
